name: KRCL – Executive – 17 Posts
qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, MBBS, MBA/PGDM

basic_details.job_title: Konkan Railway Executive Recruitment 2026 Notification Out - Apply Offline for 17 Posts
basic_details.short_information: Konkan Railway is now open for 17 Executive posts Bachelors Degree, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, MBBS, MBA/PGDM with Offline applications from 04-05-2026 to 24-05-2026 through the official website konkanrailway.com

qualification.education_qualification: Any Bachelors Degree, B.Sc, B.Tech/B.E, MBBS, MBA/PGDM

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted in the prescribed format and sent through Speed Post / Registered Post only to the given address so as to reach on or before 24.05.2026 (17:30 hrs).
